description: Hand-curated corpus of real cross-post pairs plus near-miss decoys. Used to measure FusedMomentDetector false-positive and false-negative rates against the spec acceptance criteria. Seed of 5 entries; expand to >= 100 before v1.0 promote-to-App-Store with real-world variety (short posts, posts with media references, posts with URLs, posts with mentions, threads, near-duplicates).

examples.label: positive
examples.note: Identical text, well above the short-content threshold

masto.content: Just shipped a new version with much better cross-poster handling!

bsky.content: Just shipped a new version with much better cross-poster handling!

examples.label: positive
examples.note: Trailing hashtags differ between networks; content well above short-content threshold

masto.content: Sunset over the bay was absolutely spectacular tonight, glad I caught it

bsky.content: Sunset over the bay was absolutely spectacular tonight, glad I caught it #sunset #sf

examples.label: negative
examples.note: Same author, similar topic, different posts — should NOT fuse

masto.content: Loving this album, every track is a banger

bsky.content: Best album of the year imo, every single track works

examples.label: negative
examples.note: Identical content but different authors — should NOT fuse

masto.content: Happy Friday everyone, may your weekend be restful

bsky.content: Happy Friday everyone, may your weekend be restful

examples.label: negative
examples.note: Same content/author but posted hours apart — should NOT fuse (intentional repost, not a cross-post)

masto.content: Reminder: meetup at the usual spot starting at 7 pm tonight

bsky.content: Reminder: meetup at the usual spot starting at 7 pm tonight
